ksa_text: Ability to assess privacy risks in AI systems, document AI risk assessments, and communicate AI security implications to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: ability contains GOV-relevant signals ("ai risk", "ai assess") within a Security & Privacy context (affinity 0.55). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A C-suite executive Chief Data Officer would encounter this competency in governance practice.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 0 certification-level matches (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Competency appears regularly in Chief Data Officer role descriptions and/or governance certification curricula.
